story: Dr. Takahashi cleared Billy to leave the hospital but warned him not to sail alone. He couldn’t name a single friend to call. Later, his son Matthew rang for their Sunday check‑in. Billy said the guys were there for poker and cut him short.
implausible_knowledge: He couldn’t name a single friend to call.
question: Right after Billy ends the call saying his poker buddies just arrived, what will Matthew most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Call back and stay on the line to keep his father company or arrange to check on him.
answer_without_knowledge: Hang up and let his father enjoy poker, going about the rest of his day.
